verse_text: The Lord showed me two baskets of figs set before the temple of the Lord, after Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon carried away captive Jeconiah king of Judah, the son of Jehoiakim, and the rulers, the craftsmen, the prisoners, and the wealthy men from Jerusalem, and brought them to Babylon.

links.context: The exile in Babylon is noted in [[JER.24:1]].

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
